targets.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(session_id) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play'
SELECT uniqExact(user_id) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play'

panels.title: ✅ Completion Rate
panels.description: เปอร์เซ็นต์ของเซสชันที่ดูวิดีโอจนจบ

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((countIf(event_type = 'completed') / NULLIF(countIf(event_type = 'play'), 0)) * 100, 1) FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

panels.title: ⚠️ Error Rate
panels.description: จำนวนครั้งที่เกิด Error จากคนดูทั้งหมด

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(event_time) AS time, uniq(session_id) AS views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT device_type, uniq(session_id) as views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY views DESC

SELECT video_id AS `Video ID`, uniqExact(session_id) AS `Total Views`, uniq(user_id) AS `Unique Users`, ROUND(SUM(session_watch_time) / 60.0, 1) AS `Watch Time (mins)`, ROUND(AVG(session_watch_time), 0) AS `Avg Watch Time (s)` FROM (SELECT video_id, session_id, user_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS session_watch_time FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY video_id, session_id, user_id) GROUP BY video_id ORDER BY `Total Views` DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT country_code as code, uniq(session_id) as views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY country_code

SELECT toString(intDiv(total_watched, 10) * 10) AS second_bucket, COUNT(*) AS drop_offs FROM (SELECT session_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS total_watched, max(event_type = 'completed') AS is_completed FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY session_id) WHERE is_completed = 0 GROUP BY second_bucket ORDER BY toInt32(second_bucket)

SELECT bucket_seconds AS second, uniqMerge(viewers) AS viewers FROM app_db.video_retention_mv WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime) /* ลบ Comment ทิ้งถ้ามี dropdown: AND video_id = '$video_id' */ GROUP BY bucket_seconds ORDER BY bucket_seconds

SELECT toString(toHour(event_time)) as hour, uniq(session_id) as views FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND event_type = 'play' GROUP BY toHour(event_time) ORDER BY toInt32(hour)

WITH session_stats AS (SELECT video_id, session_id, SUM(watch_duration_seconds) AS session_watch_time_sec, MAX(event_type = 'completed') AS is_completed, MAX(event_type = 'play') AS is_play FROM app_db.video_watch_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY video_id, session_id) SELECT video_id AS Video, COUNT(session_id) AS "Total Views", ROUND(AVG(session_watch_time_sec), 0) AS "Avg Watch Time (s)", ROUND((SUM(is_completed) / NULLIF(SUM(is_play), 0)) * 100, 1) AS "Completion Rate (%)" FROM session_stats GROUP BY video_id ORDER BY "Total Views" DESC
